positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a forest clearing bathed in the soft, ethereal glow of a rising sun. The central focus is a whimsical cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna: giant, glowing mushrooms, iridescent insects fluttering near fern fronds, and delicate, glowing vines wrapping around ancient roots. The style should be a harmonious blend of detailed botanical etchings and modern, high-contrast line art. Use a restricted color palette of deep emerald green, cerulean blue, and pops of neon yellow/cyan, allowing the glowing elements to create strong focal points against the dark, richly textured background. The composition must feature clean, isolated silhouettes that pop when printed on fabric, with strong directional lighting highlighting the magical mood and intricate linework. Minimalist yet maximalist detail, perfect for repeating apparel design.
negative: blur, deformed, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy
